title: URIs, URL Resolution, Origins, DNS, and Destination Identity · Go Client Systems · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A security reviewer reconstructing an expired incident handoff must reconstruct the governing policy from partial evidence after delay and distinguish current rules from tempting earlier ones for uris, url resolution, origins, dns, and destination identity, producing destination-resolution and origin contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Go 1.26 net/http destination-resolution and origin contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Parse scheme, authority, host, port, path, query, and fragment and resolve relative references against the correct base. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Encode path segments and query names or values at the correct structural layer without double encoding. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Compare origins from scheme, host, and effective port while separating URI authority, Host, and connection address. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Destination Validation
steps.instruction:
review case — Go security handoff client receives base https://api6.example.test/v1/items/ and reference ../reports?q=a%2Fb. Resolve it structurally, compare origin and authority, trace two DNS answers, and reject any connected destination outside the approved range. Competency probe: Canonicalize and validate schemes, hosts, IP literals, ports, IDNs, and resolved destinations before granting network authority. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Destination Validation trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Destination Validation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for canonicalize and validate schemes, hosts, ip literals, ports, idns, and resolved destinations before granting network authority. demonstrate the result through go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, roundtripper, and httptest evidence. For Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Destination Validation, keep Destination Validation connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
